# services.dysnomia

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.dysnomia`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.dysnomia.components` | `attribute set of (attribute set)` | An attribute set in which each key represents a container and each value an attribute set in which each key represents a component and each value a derivation constructing its initial state |
| `services.dysnomia.containers` | `attribute set of (attribute set)` | An attribute set in which each key represents a container and each value an attribute set providing its configuration properties |
| `services.dysnomia.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Dysnomia |
| `services.dysnomia.enableAuthentication` | `boolean` | Whether to publish privacy-sensitive authentication credentials |
| `services.dysnomia.enableLegacyModules` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Dysnomia legacy process and wrapper modules |
| `services.dysnomia.extraContainerPaths` | `list of absolute path` | A list of paths containing additional container configurations that are added to the search folders |
| `services.dysnomia.extraContainerProperties` | `attribute set` | An attribute set providing additional container settings in addition to the default properties |
| `services.dysnomia.extraModulePaths` | `list of absolute path` | A list of paths containing additional modules that are added to the search folders |
| `services.dysnomia.package` | `absolute path` | The Dysnomia package |
| `services.dysnomia.properties` | `attribute set` | An attribute set in which each attribute represents a machine property. Optionally, these values can be shell substitutions. |
